channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: North Korea hackers blamed for $290M crypto theft
item.description: The hack against Kelp DAO is the largest crypto heist of the year so far.

item.title: SAP SuccessFactors HR software suite review: A powerful cloud-based solution with a steep learning curve
item.description: SAP SuccessFactors is a powerful HR suite, but is it the right choice for your business?

item.title: J’ai testé la Marshall Bromley 450 : l’enceinte de soirée qui mérite une place dans votre salon
item.description: Architecture sonore à huit amplificateurs, diffusion à 360 degrés, batterie amovible de 40 heures : Marshall signe une deuxième enceinte festive plus compacte que la Bromley 750. Voyons ce qu'elle vaut.

item.title: iPhone 17 Pro vs iPhone Air: a choice between head and heart
item.description: I've spent months testing the iPhone 17 Pro and iPhone Air — here's which one you should buy.

item.title: Fortnite developers can make AI characters now — just don’t try to date them
item.description: Following last year's AI-powered Darth Vader in Fortnite that swore in a re-creation of James Earl Jones' voice, Epic Games is now letting Fortnite creators experiment with a new "conversations" tool to create AI-powered characters that players can talk and interact with. "Instead of authoring dialogue trees for characters in your islands, conversations transforms an […]...

item.title: Mastodon says its flagship server was hit by a DDoS attack
item.description: The DDoS attack against Mastodon's flagship server comes less than a week after Bluesky was targeted with junk web traffic.

item.title: Amazon Echo, Google Nest, HomePod… quelles sont les meilleures enceintes connectées en 2026 ?
item.description: Vous avez décidé d'installer une ou plusieurs enceintes connectées chez vous ? Google Nest Mini, Amazon Echo, Apple HomePod… Il y a du choix ! On vous aide à y voir plus clair dans cette sélection des meilleures enceintes connectées avec assistant.

item.title: You won't believe AI's take on the 'history' of Stonehenge — and I am so over AI slop
item.description: Heaven help us — YouTube is now overflowing with historical AI slop, and it's making it hard to find the real thing.

item.title: Want to improve your work relationships? Try this
item.description: An award winning Columbia Business School professor shares his research findings on how to build better relationships. When building relationships, at work and beyond, most people search for deep commonalities. That may be wrong.

item.title: Live Nation settlement includes $8.9 million payment to customers for ‘deceptive fees.’ Are you eligible to file a claim?
item.description: Ticketmaster’s parent company is resolving allegations in D.C. that it misled ticket-buyers using a series of dark patterns. After years of complaints, some customers who were overcharged for an event by Ticketmaster might finally get some of their money back. On April 20, D.C. Attorney General Brian L. Schwalb announced that Live Nation, Ticketmaster’s parent company, will pay $9.9 million in a settlement to resolve his district’s allegations that it “misled customers about ticket prices, charged deceptive fees, and used illegal pressure tactics to get fans to buy tickets for a decade.”...

item.title: Deezer says AI-made songs make up 44 percent of daily uploads
item.description: AI-generated music is spreading like wildfire, according to Deezer, who reported receiving nearly 75,000 uploads of AI-made tracks a day on its platform. The alternative music streaming service based in Paris published a report revealing that 44 percent of its daily uploads are AI-generated songs, accumulating to around 2 million flagged songs a month. If that figure doesn't alarm you, Deezer said that more than 13.4 million songs were detected and flagged as AI-generated across 2025. Those statistics are made possible with Deezer's patent-pending AI music detection tool, which was launched in...

item.title: Ce forfait 5G XXL à petit prix cache un détail important à connaître
item.description: Carte SIM offerte, 5G incluse, sans engagement et un volume de data difficile à battre à ce prix : le forfait 250 Go de Lebara mérite clairement l'attention. Quelques limites à connaître avant de souscrire.

item.title: Create your dream backyard with Walmart's Patio and Garden Event — up to 50% off patio furniture, planters, grills, lawnmowers, and more
item.description: Build your dream backyard on a budget at Walmart's Patio and Garden Event, which has deals on outdoor furniture, grills, lawnmowers, and more.

item.title: Proton VPN usage spikes in Turkey following new regulatory proposals
item.description: Turkey is preparing new online controls, including VPN licensing, following recent school attacks. In response, Proton VPN has seen sign-ups double, vowing never to log or share user data with authorities.

item.title: Souveraineté numérique : c’est quoi Eurosky, cette plate-forme européenne qui veut enterrer Meta et X ?
item.description: Une initiative européenne entend créer un web social et souverain pour lutter contre la domination des géants de la tech. Eurosky, c’est son nom, permet d’accéder à plusieurs réseaux sociaux européens avec un compte unique.

item.title: FAA orders investigation into Blue Origin’s New Glenn mishap
item.description: The New Glenn rocket will have to stay grounded while the company investigates what caused the apparent failure of its upper stage.

item.title: Struggling to launch Teams? Microsoft recalls update causing failed startup and infinite loading loops – here's what we know
item.description: A service update was triggering an error in some Teams desktop clients, forcing Microsoft to revert the changes.

item.title: NSA spies are reportedly using Anthropic’s Mythos, despite Pentagon feud
item.description: NSA is said to be using Anthropic's restricted Mythos AI model.

item.title: DaVinci Resolve 21 hands-on: A viable Lightroom alternative for casual users
item.description: Blackmagic Design’s DaVinci Resolve is a highly capable free color grading tool with a history dating way back to the ‘80s, but it has never been thought of as a rival to Adobe’s Lightroom due to its video origins. Now, Blackmagic Design has released a new version in beta that may change people’s minds about that. The new Photo page lets you import RAW images then adjust them using Resolve’s powerful color grading tools. You even get access to advanced VFX and AI features not found in Lightroom. When I saw the new feature, I immediately wondered if I could cancel my $20 per month Adobe Photogr...

item.title: Une nouvelle Livebox mystérieuse apparait sur le site de l’INPI : ce qu’il faut savoir
item.description: Orange a déposé les dessins d'une nouvelle Livebox sur le site de l'INPI. Il ne faut pas forcément s'attendre à une nouveauté en France.

item.title: Birdfy’s new 4K feeder wants to teach you about the birds it identifies
item.description: Birdfy has announced a new version of its camera-equipped metal feeder with an upgraded camera to make you feel even closer to nature while staring at your phone from the sofa. The Birdfy Feeder Metal 2 has a similar design to the original, using metal panels that animals like squirrels can't chew through to access […]

item.title: What is the release date for Invincible season 4 episode 8 on Prime Video?
item.description: The final episode of Invincible season 4 will be released this week — but what day is it set to arrive on?

item.title: 'Building a PC in 2026 is an absolute treat': I asked ChatGPT and Gemini to pick my perfect gaming rig, and it nearly cost me my sanity
item.description: Here's how I trained ChatGPT and Gemini to help me shop for a new gaming PC... and why I don't think you should do the same.

item.title: WhatsApp is testing a premium subscription, but it is mainly cosmetic
item.description: WhatsApp is testing a subscription after Meta debuted a similar subscription for Instagram earlier this year

item.title: Panne mondiale de ChatGPT : l’IA ne répond plus, que se passe-t-il ?
item.description: ChatGPT est actuellement en panne à un niveau mondial. L'IA est tout simplement hors service. De nombreux utilisateurs sur le réseau social X expriment leur désarroi face à cette situation.

item.title: « Votre femme ne se souviendra de rien » : l’enquête qui expose les réseaux secrets de soumission chimique
item.description: En 2024, le procès Dominique Pelicot avait mis en lumière l'existence de communautés en ligne où des hommes s'organisent pour droguer et agresser leurs conjointes. Une enquête approfondie publiée en mars 2026 révèle que ces réseaux n'ont pas disparu. Ils ont proliféré.

item.title: Mission 1 : voici les prix des action cams GoPro pour les pro, dont son modèle à objectif interchangeable
item.description: La marque GoPro annonce la gamme de caméras MISSION 1. Une gamme de caméras pensées pour les pros, il fallait y penser.

item.title: A robot runner just beat a half-marathon record
item.description: Chinese tech company Honor took home the gold at a Beijing race featuring both robot and human runners.

item.title: SNAP benefits changes begin in Florida today. These states are next
item.description: New food restriction waivers enable states to exclude sugary foods and drinks from purchases made through the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program. Changes to the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP) begin today in Florida. Program recipients can no longer use their SNAP benefits to purchase soda, energy drinks, candy, and prepared desserts. ...

item.title: Dyson PencilVac Fluffycones review: Almost the perfect floor cleaner for tiny apartments
item.description: The big deal with Dyson’s new vacuum is how small it is. While “pencil” is certainly an ambitious noun to compare a floor vacuum to, the slender body of the PencilVac Fluffycones ($600) brings to mind mops and brooms rather than hulking cyclone-suction tech and connected cleaning. As we described it last year, it’s the company's most stick-like stick vacuum yet. Dyson has been repurposing its engine tech into smaller form factors for years, such as its hair dryers. However, this is the first time it’s been utilized for floor cleaning. Dyson recently launched the PencilVac Fluffy, with a more t...

item.title: I used to be a VC. Now I’ve found a better way to build a company
item.description: If you want to create an Evergreen company that’s designed to last, follow the example of some of the world’s largest tech companies: Don’t raise large amounts of venture capital. These days, many founders feel pressure to raise tremendous amounts of venture capital. But it wasn’t always like this. Most people are surprised to learn that four of the most valuable companies in the world barely raised any VC funding at all by today’s standards....

item.title: The Elden Ring movie hits theaters on March 3, 2028
item.description: Bandai Namco and A24 have announced that the Elden Ring movie will hit theaters on March 3, 2028. Filming is set to begin in the next several weeks. The movie was first revealed over a year ago, so this is a welcome update. We also got a full cast announcement, though the companies haven't said who or what everyone is portraying. The cast includes Kit Connor from Heartstopper, Ben Whishaw from the beloved Paddington movies and Cailee Spaeny from Alien: Romulus. Peter Serafinowicz, Jonathan Pryce, Nick Offerman and Sonoya Mizuno will also appear in the film. Elden Ring will be written and dire...

item.title: Humanoid ‘Lightning’ robot smashes the half-marathon record
item.description: An autonomous scarlet robot named "Lightning" finished a 13-mile race in Beijing on Sunday in just 50 minutes and 26 seconds, less than half the time of last year's fastest robot, which took two hours and 40 minutes. As Reuters reports, Du Xiaodi, one of the engineers who developed Lightning at smartphone company Honor, said […]

item.title: Score this 65-inch Toshiba mini-LED 4K TV for $500 off
item.description: As of April 20, you can get the 65-inch Toshiba Class Z670R Series Smart Fire TV for $999.99 at Amazon, down from $1,499.99.

item.title: Boost your business: Why FrontAccounting is the web-based accounting solution you need
item.description: Accounting software comes in many forms and many of these are now offered as web packages.

item.title: CEO and CFO suddenly depart AI nuclear power upstart Fermi
item.description: The startup, co-founded by former U.S. Energy Secretary Rick Perry, has faced headwinds with its AI campus in Texas.

item.title: Ces drones chinois se rechargent par micro-ondes en plein vol, plus besoin de se poser
item.description: Des chercheurs de l'Université de Xidian ont développé un système de recharge de drones par micro-ondes depuis un véhicule terrestre en mouvement.

item.title: Ioniq 3 : une Hyundai électrique à moins de 30 000 euros taillée pour l’Europe
item.description: Taillé pour l'Europe. La nouvelle Ioniq 3 de Hyundai a été dévoilé en première mondiale lors de la Milan Design Week. Si elle a du style à revendre, elle a également quelques autres arguments qui pourraient en faire une des stars de cette fin d'année dans le marché de l'électrique.

item.title: Sage HR software review
item.description: An SMB-specific option from one of the biggest names in business software – is this your next HR upgrade?

item.title: HiBob HR software review
item.description: A modern, flexible HR solution that prioritizes culture, community, and customization – is it time to say hello to HiBob?

item.title: Factorial HR software review
item.description: It’s designed to streamline SMB operations. Could Factorial be your next HR upgrade?

item.title: UKG Ready HR software review
item.description: It’s a strong option, especially for shift work, but can UKG Ready compete with a competitive group of rivals?

item.title: Artemis II commander shares a remarkable video of Earth vanishing behind the Moon
item.description: We’ve seen some astonishing photos of an Earthset — the Earth setting behind the Moon — from the Artemis II crew’s history-making trip around our planet’s closest neighbor. Now, Reid Wiseman, the mission’s commander, has shared a remarkable video of that same phenomenon.While mission specialist Christina Koch was using a Nikon camera to snap stunning still images of the Earthset, Wiseman used an iPhone 17 Pro Max to film the moment. “I could barely see the Moon through the docking hatch window but the iPhone was the perfect size to catch the view… This is uncropped, uncut with 8x zoom which is...

item.title: Apple AirTags are over 40% off — and at a new record-low price
item.description: A four-pack of the first generation Apple AirTags are available for just $56.99 at Woot, slashing their price by $42.01.

item.title: Blue Origin’s New Glenn rocket grounded after delivering satellite to wrong orbit
item.description: The Federal Aviation Administration grounded Blue Origin's New Glenn rocket after it shuttled its payload to the wrong orbit during its launch on Sunday, according to a report from the Orlando Sentinel. "The FAA is aware that Blue Origin New Glenn 3 experienced a mishap during the second-stage flight sequence following a successful launch," the […]
